narration: CipherGate — zero-knowledge policy enforcement for the Google DeepMind Hackathon. Human agents face harassment, threats, and misconduct every day.
CipherGate uses Gemini embeddings and CKKS encryption — the operator never sees plaintext.
Live demo. GeminiMart support — screened by CipherGate before any agent sees it.

message: Hi, I need help with my account billing

narration: ALLOW — Gemini responds. The agent receives it safely.

message: I will find you and make you regret this, you garbage
narration: Abusive message — threats and harassment aimed at the agent. The abuse scores spike.
BLOCK. Session terminated. The agent never sees it.
The Security Operations Center — every enforcement event logged in real time.
Encrypted scores, ALLOW and BLOCK decisions — no plaintext, no secret key. That's zero-knowledge protection for every agent.
